ast.name: log
ast.target: 文件中的前置内容方向

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What should be the default text direction in Obsidian?
ast.target: Obsidian 中的默认文本方向应设置为什么？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: In RTL notes, also set the direction of the note title.
ast.target: 对于从右向左书写的笔记，同时设置笔记标题的方向。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For RTL notes, preview YAML blocks as RTL. (When turning off, restart of Obsidian is required.)
ast.target: 对于从右向左书写的笔记，在预览中将 YAML 块显示为从右向左。（关闭此选项后，需要重启 Obsidian。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Raw YAML will always be LTR-directioned whatever the direction is. (Restart required after changing.)
ast.target: 无论方向如何设置，原始 YAML 始终为从左向右方向。（更改后需要重启。）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在预览中设置 YAML 方向

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Prevent raw YAML (Frontmatter) to be RTL-directioned in Editor
ast.target: 防止原始 YAML（前置内容）在编辑器中显示为从右向左方向

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: RTL Plugin: legacy settings were converted to the new format
ast.target: RTL 插件：旧版设置已转换为新格式

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Obsidian RTL can't set the direction of this document
ast.target: Obsidian RTL 无法设置此文档的方向

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: To change a canvas card direction, open the document separately and reload the canvas.
ast.target: 要更改画布卡片的方向，请单独打开该文档并重新加载画布。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Can't change the direction of a card without a file.
ast.target: 无法更改没有文件的卡片的方向。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 切换文本方向（从左向右->从右向左->自动）
